name: imap-smtp-mail
description: Read, search, summarize, and send email through IMAP/SMTP providers.

interface.longDescription: Adapted from the original imap-smtp-email skill by gzlicanyi (https://github.com/gzlicanyi; source: https://github.com/openclaw/skills/tree/main/skills/gzlicanyi/imap-smtp-email). Use IMAP/SMTP mailboxes such as QQ Mail, NetEase Mail, Ali Mail, 139 Mail, and custom enterprise mailboxes to search inboxes, read threads, save attachments, and draft or send email from Codex.
defaultPrompt: 总结我最近的邮箱收件箱
帮我起草一封中文邮件回复
